assertions.notes: ADR-051 draft_match_results / draft_picks write paths are not yet built. The premier-draft-pack.log and premier-draft-pick.log player-log fixtures ARE promoted to REAL in the corpus MANIFEST, but the daemon does not yet write to draft_match_results or draft_picks tables. The BFF returns empty draft history. expected_empty: true means the harness asserts the empty-state component renders (data-testid='draft-history-empty') rather than asserting row data. A 0/0 rendering without the empty-state indicator is still a FAIL. Once ADR-051 write paths land and corpus draft fixtures are promoted, regenerate this manifest with expected_empty: false and the actual draft result values.
